ddls:
CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "market_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data entry */,
  "chdn_call_strike" INTEGER /* Call strike price */,
  "d4" REAL /* Value of column d4 */,
  "d32" REAL /* Value of column d32 */,
  "close" INTEGER /* Closing price */,
  "daily_hv" REAL /* Daily historical volatility */,
  "intra_hv" REAL /* Intra-day historical volatility */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the market data */,
  "market_type" TEXT /* Type of market (e.g., options, stocks, forex) */,
  "instrument" TEXT /* Instrument being traded (e.g., stock, ETF, currency pair) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the market data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the market data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("market_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, trader, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the users table */,
  "login_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user logged in */,
  "logout_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user logged out */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market indicator */,
  "market_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the market_data table */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the market indicator */,
  "indicator_value" REAL /* Value of the market indicator */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the market indicator was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the market indicator was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_indicators_market_id FOREIGN KEY ("market_id") REFERENCES market_data ("market_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data visualization */,
  "market_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the market_data table */,
  "visualization_name" TEXT /* Name of the data visualization */,
  "visualization_data" TEXT /* Data for the data visualization */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data visualization was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data visualization was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_visualizations_market_id FOREIGN KEY ("market_id") REFERENCES market_data ("market_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "custom_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each custom model */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the users table */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the custom model */,
  "model_data" TEXT /* Data for the custom model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the custom model was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the custom model was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_custom_models_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the custom_models table */,
  "market_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the market_data table */,
  "prediction_data" TEXT /* Data for the prediction */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the prediction was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the prediction was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES custom_models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_market_id FOREIGN KEY ("market_id") REFERENCES market_data ("market_id")
)
